title: Creative Prompt Generator
scenario: Generate a short, catchy phrase for a new product launch. The product is a smart home assistant that helps with household chores. The phrase should be 5-7 words long.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated phrase meets the word count and word inclusion criteria.
Assess the uniqueness and creativity of the phrase.
Evaluate if the phrase has a positive, uplifting tone.
